title: Site
description: Offers guided meditations, sleep stories, and calming music to help users relax and improve sleep.

title: Schema
description: Provides a variety of guided meditations, sleep content, and mindfulness exercises for daily use.

title: Config
description: Focuses on sleep and stress reduction with guided meditations in multiple languages.

title: Schema Ingestion
description: Import and register new data schemas into the registry for validation and visualization.

title: BigQuery Ingestion
description: Directly extract schema metadata from Google BigQuery datasets using service account credentials.

title: Oracle Ingestion
description: Connect to Oracle databases to extract table structures, constraints, and relationships.

title: Postgres Ingestion
description: Import schema metadata from PostgreSQL databases using standard information schema catalogs.

title: MS SQL Ingestion
description: Connect to Microsoft SQL Server to scan table objects, views, and index definitions.

title: MySQL Ingestion
description: Import schema metadata from MySQL or MariaDB databases using information schema catalogs.

title: MongoDB Ingestion
description: Infer schema structures from MongoDB collections using document sampling and pattern matching.

title: Cloud Storage Ingestion
description: Register and scan metadata from Google Cloud Storage buckets and objects.

title: Google Cloud
description: Overview of GCP infrastructure, services, and integration points.

title: AWS
description: Overview of AWS cloud resources, VPCs, and serverless architectures.

title: GCVE
description: Google Cloud VMware Engine management and hybrid cloud orchestration.

title: SaaS Solutions
description: Inventory and connection status of various SaaS platforms and APIs.

title: Environments
description: Manage and monitor Production (Prod, Staging) and Non-Production (Dev, Test) environment states.
